case_title: ANTHONY MARTORANA VS. DAVID SILVER et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MARTORANA, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT SILVER, DAVID CLIFFORD, JAMINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE, PER PLAINTIFF. "CLAIMS (3) EXCEED JURISDICTIONAL LIMIT OF SMALL CLAIMS COURT", PER JUDGE MITCHELL.APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT DAVID SILVER WAIVES SERVICE ON OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 60.00 - SERVED MAY-30-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CLIFFORD, JAMINE
